label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what a person who enjoys the arts may do, based on the information in the passage. The options are A through D. First, I need to recall what the passage said. The main points were that people who engage with the arts from a young age have better jobs and higher salaries. The study suggests that this is because art study develops reasoning, problem-solving, creative and critical thinking skills. Also, the arts help us see the world beyond our own experiences, appreciate different perspectives, and communicate and cooperate better with others. Looking at the answer choices: A) see things from different points of view B) deal with problems worse than others C) be difficult to communicate with others D) prefer to stay at home rather than go out The passage clearly states that the arts help develop the ability to see things from many different points of view, which helps in communication and cooperation. So option A is directly supported by
